Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Lorentzen Co.
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Granted
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Kathleena A. Kelly; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; CSR: Mitch Lyon #6840.

Rikus Linschoten, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Judy Crim, as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir of Cecil Crim, deceased; and Steven Crim, Kelli Ryan, as Wrongful Death Heirs of Cecil Crim, deceased.
Order waiving appearance for live testimony of a witness is in file.
Default of Defendant Lorentzen Co. has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Lorentzen Co. as follows:
Economic Damages $669,798.34
Non-Economic Damages $2,610,720.00
No Attorney's Fees or Costs requested.
for a total judgment in the amount of $3,280,518.34.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
